defs: Kind; genus; class; form; style, esp. in literature.
quotes: French drama was lisping or still inarticulate; the great French genre of the fabliau was hardly born.
A particular demand . . . that we shall pay special attention to the matter of genres -- that is, to the different forms or categories of literature.

defs: A style of painting, sculpture, or other imitative art, which illustrates everyday life and manners.
